case_title: STEVEN KING VS. PATRICK PHILIP HAJEK

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00). SERVED DEC-24-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HAJEK, PATRICK PHILIP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2008 - JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAJEK, PATRICK PHILIP $540.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $665.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $5400.00- AND ATTRIBUTES 10% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO DEFENDANT HAJEK. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD AGAINST THIS DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF KING, STEVEN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HAJEK, PATRICK PHILIP
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KING, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT HAJEK, PATRICK PHILIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF KING, STEVEN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
